answers: Boost creativity: expose yourself to diverse experiences, read widely, brainstorm without judgment, and take walks.
Techniques: SCAMPER, random word association, mind mapping, what-if scenarios, and reverse brainstorming.
Tips: embrace boredom (ideas come in idle moments), keep a notebook, cross-pollinate ideas from different fields.
Creativity is a skill you can develop — it's not just talent. Practice daily, and don't fear bad ideas. Quantity leads to quality.
